'''Kithra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She was one of two [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] warrior-women who served as escorts for [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] when Jade was acting as a [[Smugglers' Alliance]] representative in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
